lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The mechanical systems require major repairs.
Mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior consistent with normal use. All mechanical systems are functional and the car has been well-maintained.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that gets the job done? This car is a solid runner with plenty of life left! While it shows some honest wear and tear and could use a little cosmetic TLC, it's a dependable choice that drives well. Perfect for someone looking for a practical, budget-friendly ride with great potential!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents nicely with a clean finish, though it does show some minor stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with regular road use. Inside, the interior is clean and well-kept, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster and steering wheel. Mechanically, the car is sound, starts reliably, and has received regular service updates. A buyer can expect a dependable vehicle that is ready to be driven immediately, offering a great balance of performance and preservation without the premium of a mint-condition show car.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows some expected wear for its age, including several noticeable scratches on the passenger side and a minor dent on the rear fender. The paint is mostly intact but shows some fading on the roof. Inside, the interior is functional and clean, though there is visible wear on the driver's seat bolster and some light staining on the carpets. All major electronics and the climate control system are working as they should. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though the brakes will likely need servicing in the near future. It is a dependable vehicle for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and long-term reliability. Secure a vehicle that commands respect without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride and it’s looking for a new home! It’s been super reliable for me and is still in really solid shape, perfect for someone who wants a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It drives smoothly and has been well-loved over the years. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it feels on the road!

Experience the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering with this E46 M3. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L I6, this unit features crisp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies and a seamless power band thanks to a recently serviced double-VANOS system. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission pairs with a torque-sensing limited-slip differential for an analog driving experience. Crucially, the rear subframe has been reinforced, and the suspension geometry is maintained by refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. While the exterior reflects honest road use, the mechanical vitals are top-tier, including a comprehensive cooling system refresh and a recent valve adjustment.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep luster, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the upholstery shows minimal aging, and every electronic feature—from the premium audio system to the dual-zone climate control—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and a recent set of high-quality tires. It drives smooth and straight, with a responsive powertrain and firm braking. This is an honest, dependable car that has been consistently cared for and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any looming maintenance needs.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating a consistent service history and a refined aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Each mechanical system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure operational excellence, making this an ideal acquisition for those who prioritize engineering integrity and sustained value.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous inspection process, it demonstrates mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. The interior remains refined, reflecting a history of conscientious ownership. For the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile, this offering provides an exemplary driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that's been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure, you've found it! This car is in great shape, runs smoothly, and has plenty of life left in it. It’s been my trusty companion, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways—you’re going to love how it handles!

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a prime example of pride in ownership. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor road wear expected from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, and every electronic feature, from the climate control to the infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule with a documented history of regular oil changes and a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. It drives smoothly, shifts precisely, and offers the kind of dependable performance that provides true peace of mind for its next owner. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this car is a reliable and stylish choice for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that balances performance with everyday practicality.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. With healthy tire tread, a robust battery, and a comprehensive service log included, this car is turn-key ready for its next adventure.

I’ve loved every mile in this car, but it’s time for it to find a new home. Come take it for a spin, I’m sure you’ll fall in love with it just like I did!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. This driver’s example benefits from a documented VANOS system service and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The factory limited-slip differential provides excellent power delivery through the corners, complemented by a refreshed suspension utilizing polyurethane bushings for improved kinematic precision. While the aesthetics reflect honest road use, the drivetrain remains robust with linear power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. A turn-key performance icon for the enthusiast who prioritizes mechanical pedigree and analog feedback.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Regularly serviced.
